backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a real estate app backend with contact form submission, contact request retrieval (admin-only), and user profile management with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the integration of Nano Banana-sourced property/lifestyle images into HeroSection, FeaturesSection, and AboutSection components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Truncated JSON file containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/.ic-assets.json: Internet Computer asset configuration that ensures the .well-known directory is not ignored during deployment.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind layers and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, a real estate brand title, and Google Fonts preconnect links for Inter and Playfair Display fonts.
frontend/public/.well-known/ic-domains: Internet Computer custom domain verification file listing the apex and www domains for myplaceatqueretaro.com.
frontend/public/robots.txt: SEO-friendly robots.txt that allows all major crawlers (Googlebot, Bingbot, PerplexityBot, and all others) full access to the site.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the single-page landing layout by composing Header, Hero, Features, About, Contact, ScheduleConsultation, and Footer sections in order.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Two-column About section displaying company description, trust indicators (experience, clients, satisfaction), and a Nano Banana team photo on the right.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Native HTML form component that submits to Formspree with four required fields (name, email, phone, message) and accessible 44px touch targets.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section combining the ContactForm with business contact details, social media links (Facebook, Instagram, YouTube), and business hours, all opening external links in new tabs.
Renders a 'Why Choose Us' section with four feature cards (Premium Accommodations, Prime Locations, Trusted Service, Personalized Experience), each containing an image, icon, title, and description, plus a YouTube CTA button.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with the brand logo, quick navigation links (scroll-based), legal links, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the full-screen hero section with a background image, headline, subtitle, and two CTA buttons ('Start Your Journey' and 'Learn More') that scroll to relevant sections.
frontend/src/components/LandingHeader.ts: Renders a fixed navigation header with the site logo, desktop nav links, a 'Book' CTA button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu that scrolls to page sections on click.
frontend/src/components/ScheduleConsulta: Renders a consultation scheduling section that lazily loads and displays an inline Calendly booking widget when the user clicks the 'Book' button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and returns an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) actors, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and exposing login status states to child components.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a warm terracotta/colonial color theme, including light and dark mode variants.
frontend/src/lib/scrollToSection.ts: Exports a `scrollToSection` utility that smoothly scrolls to a DOM element by ID, offsetting for the fixed header height.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and a custom `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends typography/animation/shadow utilities, and registers typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the current version, existing features, and a pending action request to integrate Nano Banana images into the landing page.
